jobs.source: materials/插畫視覺風格/產生的圖片 1.png
jobs.notes: Hero 微呼吸。使用新版 1536x1024 hero 作為首格。 已移入 archive，保留為歷史試片，不列入預設 prepare/run。
jobs.prompt: Subtle 2-second seamless loop. Garden leaves and grass sway almost imperceptibly, the small watering robot releases a few tiny sparkling droplets, dark ink-blob spam creatures on the left slowly float and pulse, one content card drifts gently downward, and the robot blinks once. Camera locked, no cuts, no zoom; the gouache painting gently breathes; everything else stays perfectly still.

jobs.source: materials/插畫視覺風格/產生的圖片 1.png
jobs.notes: A1 強化版。明確要求角色與物件可見但溫和的動作。 已移入 archive，保留為歷史試片，不列入預設 prepare/run。
jobs.prompt: Two-second seamless animated loop from this gouache illustration. Make the characters visibly but gently move while preserving the same composition and painted style. The girl in the mustard coat swings the butterfly net a small arc toward the dark spam blobs. The watering robot tips the watering can and a clear thin stream of droplets falls onto the flowers. The robot in the control room turns its head slightly and blinks once. One content card falls downward by about 60 pixels. The dark ink-blob spam creatures bob and pulse in place. People in the garden make tiny reading and head-turning motions. Leaves and grass sway softly. Camera locked, no cuts, no zoom, no morphing faces, no new text, no logos.

jobs.notes: Matty-v2 hero。粗獷 gouache 筆觸、每張最多一隻 Matty，sora-2-pro / 1920x1080 高解析重跑。
jobs.prompt: Create a lively four-second animation from this exact Matty-v2 gouache hero illustration. Preserve the current frame, rough Bologna children-book gouache brushwork, old paper grain, dry-brush broken edges, and the rule that exactly one Matty appears in the entire image. Do not create any extra Matty, extra blue robot, duplicate helper, or new mascot. Keep the same composition, same camera, no cuts and no zoom. The single Matty in the garden gently tips the watering can, visible water pours onto plants, then Matty blinks and gives a small friendly nod. The human operator in the control room moves slightly and studies the chart. On the left, the mustard-coat person waves the butterfly net while black spam creatures bob, wobble, raise tiny arms, blink, and protest. Human readers turn pages, nod, lift hands, and subtly shift posture. People in the right crowd wave small arms and lean forward. Workers below sweep cards into the cart with clear broom strokes. A few content cards flutter downward. Leaves, flowers, and grass sway. Motion should be visible at webpage hero size while preserving the exact Matty-v2 face design and rough hand-painted texture. No new text, no logos, no face morphing, no duplicate Matty, no chaotic camera movement.

jobs.source: materials/插畫視覺風格/產生的圖片 1.png
jobs.notes: A1c 方向延伸。保留 4 秒，左側暗區只要鬼怪與卡片，不要新增或凸顯人類。 已移入 archive，保留為歷史試片，不列入預設 prepare/run。
jobs.prompt: Create a lively four-second hand-painted gouache animation from this exact illustration. Keep the same composition, same camera, same paper texture, no cuts and no zoom. The left dark spam area should contain only black ghost-like spam creatures and fluttering content cards. Do not add any new human figures, human faces, or large people on the left side. Do not make the mustard-coat person on the left prominent; visually de-emphasize that figure and keep attention on the ghost creatures. The black ghost creatures should be the main action on the left: they bob, wobble, blink, raise tiny arms, protest, drift around each other, and react as a lively swarm while staying in the dark area. Across the rest of the scene, every existing robot and human should make clear gentle storybook motions. The white garden robot tips the watering can and visible water droplets fall onto plants. The control-room robot turns its head, raises a small arm, and the magnifying glass glints. Human readers turn pages, nod, lift hands, and subtly shift posture. People in the right crowd wave small arms and lean forward. Workers in the lower floor sweep cards into the cart with visible broom strokes. A few content cards flutter downward. Leaves, flowers, and grass sway. Motion should be clearly visible at webpage hero size, charming and animated, while preserving the illustration style and avoiding new text, logos, face morphing, or chaotic camera movement.

People in the right crowd wave small arms and lean forward. Workers in the lower floor sweep cards into the cart with visible broom strokes. A few content cards flutter downward. Leaves, flowers, and grass sway. Motion should be clearly visible at webpage hero size, charming and animated, while preserving the illustration style and avoiding new text, logos, face morphing, or chaotic camera movement.

jobs.notes: 使用無左側人類 reference，動作幅度向 A1c 靠攏。 已移入 archive，保留為歷史試片，不列入預設 prepare/run。
jobs.prompt: Create a lively four-second hand-painted gouache animation from this exact edited illustration. This should be visibly animated at webpage hero size, with motion energy similar to an active storybook scene, not a subtle breathing effect. Keep the same composition, same camera, same paper texture, no cuts and no zoom. The left dark spam area must contain only black ghost-like spam creatures, black ink shapes, dark plants, and fluttering rejected content cards. Never create or reveal a human figure, human face, human body, hand, leg, butterfly net, or person on the left side. On the left, make the ghost swarm clearly active: several ghosts surge upward and sideways, wave tiny arms, wobble, blink, open mouths, protest, bump into each other, and push floating content cards around. Cards with red X marks flutter, rotate, and drift by large visible amounts. Across the rest of the scene, every existing robot and human should move clearly while preserving their identity and painted shapes. The white garden robot tips the watering can with a visible stream of droplets. The control-room robot turns its head, raises one arm, and the magnifying glass flashes. Human readers turn pages, nod, lift hands, and shift posture. People in the right crowd wave small arms and lean forward. Workers below sweep cards into the cart with clear broom strokes. Leaves, flowers, grass, and tree branches sway visibly. Preserve the gouache illustration style; no new text, no logos, no face morphing, no new yellow mascot characters, no chaotic camera movement.

jobs.prompt: Subtle 2-second seamless loop. A shadowy gate on both sides closes by a small amount over the glowing website path, darkening the upper scene, then several tiny distributed nodes below the ground glow to life and connect with faint warm threads. The motion is restrained and loopable, implying block and persistence. Camera locked, no cuts, no zoom; the gouache painting gently breathes; everything else stays perfectly still.

jobs.notes: 需要先生成 N1 下潛暗幕背景，再送 Sora。
jobs.prompt: Subtle 2-second seamless loop. Dark ink-blob spam creatures slowly rise from the bottom edge like a soft black tide, gently covering the lower part of the frame. A few grey content cards drift downward in the background. Camera locked, no cuts, no zoom; the gouache painting gently breathes; everything else stays perfectly still.

jobs.notes: N1 暗幕。A1c 原則，4 秒，鬼怪與卡片有明顯湧動。
jobs.prompt: Create a lively four-second hand-painted gouache animation from this exact dark underworld illustration. This should be visibly animated, not a subtle breathing effect. Keep the same composition, same camera, same paper texture, no cuts and no zoom. The black ghost-like spam creatures surge upward from the bottom and sides in waves, bob, wobble, blink, raise tiny arms, open mouths, and crowd toward the center. Rejected content cards with red X marks flutter, rotate, tumble, and drift upward and downward by large visible amounts. Dark smoky foliage and ink waves ripple like a soft tide. The tiny violet light in the distance flickers faintly. The motion should feel like a living spam flood swallowing the frame while preserving the gouache style. No human figures, no human faces, no robots, no text, no logos, no camera movement.

jobs.prompt: Create a lively four-second hand-painted gouache animation from this exact bright garden illustration. This should be visibly animated at webpage size, not a subtle breathing effect. Keep the same composition, same camera, same paper texture, no cuts and no zoom. Warm daylight blooms from the top and moves across the frame like a soft wave. Flowers open visibly, leaves sway, small garden islands gently rise and settle, tiny light motes drift upward, and the remaining dark specks retreat and dissolve at the edges. Any small robot or creature visible in the scene should blink, nod, or shift posture. Make the transition feel like emerging into light and air. Preserve the gouache style; no new text, no logos, no face morphing, no chaotic camera movement.

jobs.prompt: Create a lively four-second hand-painted gouache animation from this exact spam blob illustration. This should be visibly animated, not subtle. Keep the same composition, same camera, same paper texture, no cuts and no zoom. The dark spam blob creature wobbles, squashes, stretches, blinks, raises both tiny arms, opens its mouth, looks worried, then splits into two small duplicate ink blobs that bounce outward and merge back into the main body. Small ink droplets ripple around it and settle. Preserve the same cute gouache creature design. No new text, no logos, no human body parts, no camera movement.

jobs.notes: Matty-v2 detection。粗獷 gouache 筆觸、單一 Matty，用放大鏡協助偵測，sora-2-pro / 1920x1080 高解析重跑。
jobs.prompt: Create a lively four-second animation from this exact Matty-v2 detection illustration. Preserve the rough Bologna gouache texture, old paper grain, dry-brush edges, muted colors, and exactly one Matty companion robot. Keep the same composition, same camera, no cuts and no zoom. Matty slowly scans left and right with the magnifying glass, leans forward, blinks, and gives a small helpful nod. The lens flashes with a soft glint. The content card under inspection shivers slightly. The black spam creatures and dark shapes on the left bob, wobble, blink, and protest with tiny arm motions. Cards near the dark area flutter and rotate. Leaves and flowers sway. Preserve the Matty-v2 design and rough handmade brushwork. No new text, no logos, no face morphing, no duplicate Matty, no chaotic camera movement.

jobs.notes: Matty-v2 crowd。粗獷 gouache 筆觸、單一 Matty 是群眾朋友，sora-2-pro / 1920x1080 高解析重跑。
jobs.prompt: Create a lively four-second animation from this exact Matty-v2 crowd illustration. Preserve the rough Bologna gouache texture, old paper grain, dry-brush edges, muted colors, and exactly one Matty companion robot among the people. Keep the same composition, same camera, no cuts and no zoom. Every visible human figure should make a clear gentle storybook motion: wave a small arm, lean forward, nod, turn a head, lift a lantern, or shift posture. The single Matty blinks, nods, and gestures warmly toward the basket as a community friend. Lantern flames flicker and cast warm pulses of light onto faces, hands, plants, and Matty. Black spam creatures in and around the basket bob, wobble, blink, and protest. Small sparks and motes drift upward. Flags, leaves, flowers, and grass sway. Preserve the Matty-v2 design and rough handmade brushwork. No new text, no logos, no face morphing, no duplicate Matty, no chaotic camera movement.

jobs.notes: Matty-v2 DNS。粗獷 gouache 筆觸、單一 Matty 指向分散節點，sora-2-pro / 1920x1080 高解析重跑。
jobs.prompt: Create a lively four-second animation from this exact Matty-v2 DNS blocking illustration. Preserve the rough Bologna gouache texture, old paper grain, dry-brush edges, muted colors, and exactly one Matty companion robot at the path edge. Keep the same composition, same camera, no cuts and no zoom. The large dark gate doors swing inward with a clear but gentle motion, shadow rolling across the warm garden path. The single Matty blinks, nods, and gestures toward the glowing distributed network nodes below. Ghost-like dark shapes and rejected cards swirl near the closing gate. Several small distributed nodes light up one by one, then connect with glowing warm threads that pulse visibly. Tiny visitors turn slightly. Leaves and plants sway. Preserve the Matty-v2 design and rough handmade brushwork. No new text, no logos, no face morphing, no duplicate Matty, no chaotic camera movement.
